title: agathis obtusa
intro: Agathis obtusa, also known as the Kanari tree or Philippine mahogany, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agathis obtusa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions to treat various ailments, and it is also used in folk medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
